name: Canvas API (2D)
performance_characteristics: Immediate-mode raster drawing; handles thousands of shapes/particles far better than DOM/SVG, but redraws are main-thread unless offloaded to an OffscreenCanvas worker
strengths: Scales to thousands of elements/particles where DOM and SVG bog down
Full pixel access for image processing, filters and generative art
OffscreenCanvas allows rendering on a worker thread to free the main thread
weaknesses: Pixels only: no DOM, no built-in accessibility, hit-testing must be hand-rolled
Not resolution-independent; needs devicePixelRatio scaling to stay sharp
All scene state and redraw logic is the developer's responsibility
Text rendering and selection are far weaker than HTML/SVG
